title: Set PREFIX on FreeBSD and use gpg-config to detect paths
body:
Unconditionally set PREFIX to /usr/local on FreeBSD and Darwin
platforms.
Use gpg-config to detect libraries paths on all platforms.

Fixes error with gpgme not able to locate gpgme.h on FreeBSD.

Ref https://github.com/containers/skopeo/issues/1163

comments.body: @mateuszkwiatkowski Needs a rebase, since my Makefile merged.

Hello,

I force pushed rebased version. PTAL, thanks!

Could you please tag a new release which would include this PR? I'd appreciate.
Thanks for the ping!  I think we can cut a new release after the upcoming release of containers/image.
